languages.text: "Разнести большую зловещую машину на кусочки — отменное веселье, шерин!" {n}Хладная торговка азартно улыбается.{/n} "В самом деле, мы ведь не можем взять и унести ее с собой? Пусть тогда не достанется никому, включая здешних хозяев".

traits.locale_text: "Разнести большую зловещую машину на кусочки — отменное веселье, шерин!" {n}Хладная торговка азартно улыбается.{/n} "В самом деле, мы ведь не можем взять и унести ее с собой? Пусть тогда не достанется никому, включая здешних хозяев".
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

traits.locale_text: Драфт: говорит, что это будет весело

languages.text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The Cold Trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."
languages.original_text: "Разнести большую зловещую машину на кусочки — отменное веселье, шерин!" {n}Хладная торговка азартно улыбается.{/n} "В самом деле, мы ведь не можем взять и унести ее с собой? Пусть тогда не достанется никому, включая здешних хозяев".

traits.locale_text: "Smashing a great, sinister machine into pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins with eager excitement.{/n} "Truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then let it fall to no one, including the masters of this place."

"Smashing a great, sinister machine into pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins with eager excitement.{/n} "Truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then let it fall to no one, including the masters of this place."

"Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

"Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

"Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The Cold Trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

languages.text: «¡Hacer pedazos una máquina grande y siniestra parece divertido, shereen!». {n}La comerciante fría sonríe, entusiasta.{/n} «Pero hablando en serio, no podemos llevárnosla, así que será mejor evitar que caiga en manos de nadie, incluyendo a los amos de este lugar».
languages.original_text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

traits.locale_text: «¡Hacer pedazos una máquina grande y siniestra parece divertido, shereen!». {n}La comerciante fría sonríe, entusiasta.{/n} «Pero hablando en serio, no podemos llevárnosla, así que será mejor evitar que caiga en manos de nadie, incluyendo a los amos de este lugar».

languages.text: “把那台阴沉的大机器砸个粉碎，倒不失为一桩乐子，亲爱的！”{n}这位冷市商人咧嘴一笑，满脸跃跃欲试。{/n}“不过说真的，咱们应该不能直接把它带走吧？这么一来，它就落不到任何人手里，连这地方的主人也别想染指。”
languages.original_text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

traits.locale_text: “把那台阴沉的大机器砸个粉碎，倒不失为一桩乐子，亲爱的！”{n}这位冷市商人咧嘴一笑，满脸跃跃欲试。{/n}“不过说真的，咱们应该不能直接把它带走吧？这么一来，它就落不到任何人手里，连这地方的主人也别想染指。”

languages.text: « Réduire en miettes une machine sinistre, voilà qui devrait être amusant, shereen ! » {n}L'adepte du Commerce Froid affiche un grand sourire.{/n} « On ne peut pas l'emporter avec nous, n'est-ce pas ? Alors, cette machine ne doit pas tomber aux mains de quiconque, y compris celles des maîtres de ces lieux. »
languages.original_text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

traits.locale_text: « Réduire en miettes une machine sinistre, voilà qui devrait être amusant, shereen ! » {n}L'adepte du Commerce Froid affiche un grand sourire.{/n} « On ne peut pas l'emporter avec nous, n'est-ce pas ? Alors, cette machine ne doit pas tomber aux mains de quiconque, y compris celles des maîtres de ces lieux. »

languages.text: "Kocaman, uğursuz bir makineyi parçalamak çok eğlenceli olurdu şirinim!" {n}Soğuk tacir hevesle sırıtıyor.{/n} "Ama dürüst olmak gerekirse onu öylece yanımıza alamayız, değil mi? O zaman buranın efendileri dâhil kimsenin eline geçmemesini sağlayabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

traits.locale_text: "Kocaman, uğursuz bir makineyi parçalamak çok eğlenceli olurdu şirinim!" {n}Soğuk tacir hevesle sırıtıyor.{/n} "Ama dürüst olmak gerekirse onu öylece yanımıza alamayız, değil mi? O zaman buranın efendileri dâhil kimsenin eline geçmemesini sağlayabiliriz."

languages.text: "Eine böse Maschine in Stücke zu schlagen, wäre ein großer Spaß, Shereen!" {n}Die Kalthändlerin grinst erwartungsvoll.{/n} "Aber im Ernst, wir können sie nicht einfach mitnehmen, oder? Wenn das so ist, darf sie aber auch niemandem sonst in die Hände fallen, auch nicht den Meistern dieses Ortes."
languages.original_text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

traits.locale_text: "Eine böse Maschine in Stücke zu schlagen, wäre ein großer Spaß, Shereen!" {n}Die Kalthändlerin grinst erwartungsvoll.{/n} "Aber im Ernst, wir können sie nicht einfach mitnehmen, oder? Wenn das so ist, darf sie aber auch niemandem sonst in die Hände fallen, auch nicht den Meistern dieses Ortes."

languages.text: 「大きな不吉な機械を粉々にするのは、ちょっとした楽しみだよ、シェリーン！」。{n}冷ややかなトレーダーは熱心に笑う。{/n}"しかし、本当に、私たちは単にそれを持って行くことはできませんよね？それなら、ここの主人も含めて、誰の手にも渡らないようにすればいい」。
languages.original_text: "Smashing a big sinister machine to pieces would be a fine bit of fun, shereen!" {n}The cold trader grins eagerly.{/n} "But truly, we cannot simply take it with us, can we? Then we can let it fall into no one's hands, including the masters of this place."

traits.locale_text: 「大きな不吉な機械を粉々にするのは、ちょっとした楽しみだよ、シェリーン！」。{n}冷ややかなトレーダーは熱心に笑う。{/n}"しかし、本当に、私たちは単にそれを持って行くことはできませんよね？それなら、ここの主人も含めて、誰の手にも渡らないようにすればいい」。
